series_metadata.series_description: Disclosure Awareness Certificates are proof that an employee or contractor that works with Federal Tax Information (FTI) records or information has received training on the disclosure and security requirements of Internal Revenue Codes 7431, 7231, and 7213A.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 5 years unless scanned and saved electronically. ; Electronic: Retain 5 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
